code:
import io
import string
import list

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  solve(line)
when None
  ()
end

fn solve(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let nums = parse_nums(line)
  let result = prefix_max(nums)
  print(format_list(result))
end

fn parse_nums(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut buf = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(buf)
          nums = push_parsed(nums, buf)
          buf = ""
        end
      else
        buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(buf)
    nums = push_parsed(nums, buf)
  end
  nums
end

fn push_parsed(_ xs: List<Int>, _ s: String) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(v)
    list.push(xs, v)
  when None
    xs
  end
end

fn prefix_max(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  while j < len
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        cur = v
        first = false
      else
        if v > cur
          cur = v
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  let len = xs.len()
  while k < len
    match xs.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  out
end
